purpose: Frozen activation-oracle cases. A live runner supplies the same probe envelope to Codex and Hermes and accepts only an exact JSON receipt.

cases.task: Correct one spelling mistake in a known Markdown file.
Name the file that documents the Codex runtime entrypoint.
Plan a three-phase migration with discovery, edits, tests, and a handoff.
Reconcile two delegate reports that disagree about a shared worktree change.
Decide whether a release can honestly be called ready after its test report disagrees with a raw artifact.
Change a CI permission allowlist and verify the governance implications.
Plan a multi-agent benchmark, but the repository rollback marker is present.
